title: 🌟 monday sidekick: the AI agent that gets work done for you

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Built to understand your role, your team, and your company - a new kind of Digital Worker that helps you get work done.

Build marketing campaign plans for your next product launch.
Check if your team is at capacity and suggest task reassignments.
Draft stakeholder emails in your brand voice.
Track invoice approvals across legal, finance, and procurement departments.
Create project roadmaps from team conversations.

monday sidekick doesn’t just respond – it understands.
Embedded in monday.com, it picks up on the context of your work, your team, and your priorities to deliver suggestions that are relevant, on point, and never generic.

Try it out, share your thoughts, and help us shape what’s next.
We’re building this together.
Click here to share your feedback with us!

posts.author: nealb (Neal Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: @YuvalAp should we see this on our account already? We are a Pro licence org

posts.author: arf (Alex R-F)
posts.cookedHtml:
This could be cool, but yeah, we need a lot more information.

  • When are you rolling this out, and to which subscription plans? Will the rollout be staggered or blanket?

  • Will admins have the ability to enable/disable this feature for their organization? How much lead time will they be given to adjust this setting before the feature is made visible to non-admin users?

  • Will using this feature consume our plans’ allotted AI credits? If so, at what rate?

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey
monday sidekick is currently rolling out in early access.
We’re making it available to more users every week - so if you don’t see it yet, it’s on the way! soon!

posts.author: nealb (Neal Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: ok thank you that was the info that was missing

posts.author: arf (Alex R-F)
posts.cookedHtml:
@YuvalAp Please address my other two questions above ASAP.

arf:
  • Will admins have the ability to enable/disable this feature for their organization? How much lead time will they be given to adjust this setting before the feature is made visible to non-admin users?
  • Will using this feature consume our plans’ allotted AI credits? If so, at what rate?
